name: @zerocmf/yishan
description: 移山通用管理系统 - 基于 React/Ant Design Pro、Fastify、Docusaurus 的 monorepo 解决方案

scripts.build: pnpm --filter yishan-tiptap build && pnpm --filter yishan-admin build && pnpm --filter yishan-docs build
scripts.build:admin:fc: PUBLIC_PATH=/admin/ pnpm --filter yishan-admin build && rm -rf apps/yishan-api/public/admin && mkdir -p apps/yishan-api/public/admin && cp -R apps/yishan-admin/dist/. apps/yishan-api/public/admin/
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter yishan-admin lint && pnpm --filter yishan-docs typecheck && pnpm --filter yishan-app lint
scripts.arch:check: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const {spawnSync}=require('child_process');const checks=['scripts/arch/check-routes.mjs','scripts/arch/check-manifest.mjs','scripts/arch/check-boundaries.mjs'];for(const file of checks){if(!fs.existsSync(file)){console.log('[arch] '+file+' missing, skipped');continue;}const r=spawnSync(process.execPath,[file],{stdio:'inherit'});if(r.status!==0){process.exit(r.status||1);}}"
scripts.type-check: pnpm --filter yishan-admin tsc && pnpm --filter yishan-docs typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter yishan-admin test && pnpm --filter yishan-api test
scripts.verify: pnpm arch:check && pnpm --filter yishan-api db:generate:test && pnpm --filter yishan-api build:ts && pnpm --filter yishan-admin lint && pnpm --filter yishan-admin test && pnpm --filter yishan-admin build && pnpm --filter yishan-api test

author: yishan
